 002: # cython: language_level=3
 003: """
 004: Cython-optimized numerical kernels for GRAVITAS Engine.
 005: 
 006: Replaces the hottest inner-loop functions with typed memoryview
 007: implementations that bypass Python/NumPy per-call overhead.
 008: 
 009: Optimized functions:
 010:   - compute_hazard_c          (called 5x per RK4 step)
 011:   - cluster_derivatives_c     (called 4x per RK4 step)
 012:   - global_derivatives_c      (called 4x per RK4 step)
 013:   - rk4_substep_c             (complete RK4 integration in C)
 014:   - compute_gini_c            (called in faction aggregation)
 015:   - compute_faction_derivs_c  (called 4x per regime integrator step)
 016:   - compute_memory_derivs_c   (called 4x per regime integrator step)
 017:   - compute_exhaustion_deriv_c(called 4x per regime integrator step)
 018: """
 019:

 021: from libc.stdlib cimport malloc, free
